title: machilus calcicola
intro: Machilus calcicola, also known as the calcicolous machilus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae, native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Machilus calcicola include the relief of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Machilus calcicola is typically prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
